creator: afsnews@afsdesenvolvimento.com.br
text:
i'm trying to install freebsd on a new machine with motherboard intel dp45sg with 8G ram dual channel and processor Q9550 core 2 quad. but i can't because the keyboard doesn't work. the problem is, in setup or in a single user mode the keyboard works well. but when we are in any screen of install wizard, the first key that i touch begin repeat in "loop" and keyboard stop to work. i change the keyboard and i use all keyboards used in other machines, they worked well. so i decide install windows in this machine and every thing works ok. after that i get the Hard Drive to other machine and install freebsd in there. when i back hd to main machine freebsd is working ok but i access it via ssh because when i put keyboard in it and touch any key the error occurs.

How-To-Repeat: put a usb keyboard in a DP45SG intel motherboard and try to touch any key.
